restaurants.name: The Saffron Room
restaurants.description: Elevated Indian dining with a seasonal tasting menu, warm lighting, and an intimate dining room suited for celebrations and business dinners.

reviews.author: Meera K.
reviews.text: Consistent quality and thoughtful service. The dal makhani and breads were outstanding.

reviews.author: Arjun S.
reviews.text: Great ambience. Reservations were honored on time; slightly noisy on a Saturday night.

reviews.author: Lisa T.
reviews.text: Perfect for a date night. Staff accommodated dietary restrictions without fuss.

restaurants.name: Coastal Plate
restaurants.description: Coastal flavours with fresh catch of the day, appams, and classic Kerala-style preparations in a relaxed, family-friendly setting.

reviews.author: Vikram R.
reviews.text: Fish curry and neer dosa were authentic. Booking online was smooth.

reviews.author: Ananya P.
reviews.text: Loved the spice levels. Wait time was minimal with a reservation.

restaurants.name: Osteria Nove
restaurants.description: Handmade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and Italian wines in a contemporary trattoria-style space with sidewalk seating.

reviews.author: Daniel H.
reviews.text: Best cacio e pepe in the city. Reservation recommended—walk-ins had a wait.

reviews.author: Priya M.
reviews.text: Lovely wine list. Portions are generous for the price tier.

restaurants.name: Ember Grill
restaurants.description: Prime cuts, classic sides, and craft cocktails in a refined grill room with open kitchen views.

reviews.author: Rohit N.
reviews.text: Steaks cooked perfectly to temperature. Professional service throughout.

restaurants.name: Sakura Izakaya
restaurants.description: Casual izakaya fare—yakitori, ramen, and small plates—paired with sake and Japanese highballs.

reviews.author: Ken Y.
reviews.text: Solid ramen and good vibe. A bit loud during peak hours.

reviews.author: Sneha D.
reviews.text: Vegetarian options were surprisingly well done.

restaurants.name: Basil Bistro
restaurants.description: Mezze, grills, and fresh salads inspired by the Eastern Mediterranean, with vegetarian-forward plates.

reviews.author: Omar F.
reviews.text: Fresh hummus and warm pita. Good for groups.

restaurants.name: Midnight Tacos
restaurants.description: Street-style tacos, aguas frescas, and margaritas in a colourful, upbeat cantina.

reviews.author: Chris L.
reviews.text: Great carnitas. Reservations help on weekends.

restaurants.name: Lotus Garden
restaurants.description: Dim sum, Thai curries, and wok dishes in a garden-themed dining room with private booths.

reviews.author: Hannah W.
reviews.text: Dim sum brunch was excellent. Easy to modify reservation online.
